ol.li: Load tail (acquire): Read current consumer position from cache-local line.
Check empty: If tail == head, buffer is empty (Producer hasn't advanced).
memcpy: Copy data from slots[tail & mask].
Update tail (release): tail.store(tail + 1, memory_order_release) to commit read.

g.text: Memory Offset Map (64B Cache Line Alignment)

div.p: Alignment Note: head and tail reside on separate cache lines (CL0, CL1) to prevent False Sharing performance degradation in multi-threaded contention.
